steps.title: Spot the temporal shift
steps.content: The passage describes how genes currently pass traits from parents to children, then shifts to what may happen in the future—when traits inherited by the child are passed to the child's own descendants.

steps.title: Find the forward-looking word
steps.content: The word “Someday” signals a future time, matching the shift from describing present inheritance to what may happen in the future. The other choices either introduce examples, clarify details, or suggest opposition—none of which fit a temporal progression. This matches choice B — B is correct.
